title: Chelamattom Shree Krishna Swami Temple
tagline: Chelamattom Shree Krishna Swami Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

heroImage.alt: Chelamattom Shree Krishna Swami Temple, Kerala

overview.short: Chelamattom Sree Krishna Temple is a Hindu temple situated in Chelamattom, Kalady, in Ernakulam district, Kerala.
overview.description: Chelamattom Sree Krishna Temple is a Hindu temple situated in Chelamattom, Kalady, in Ernakulam district, Kerala. This temple is situated near the banks of the Periyar River. This temple is known as Dakshina Kasi. The main deity in this temple is Sree Krishna.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Chelamattom
topPlaces.description: Chelamattom is a suburban region of Kochi city in Ernakulam district in the Indian state of Kerala. Chelamattom Shree Krishna Swami Temple is one of the main temple situated here.

topPlaces.name: Cheranalloor East
topPlaces.description: Cheranalloor (East) is a village in Ernakulam District, Kerala, India. It lies on the banks of Periyar River near Kalady.

topPlaces.name: Thottuva
topPlaces.description: Thottuva is a village in Ernakulam District, Kerala, India. It lies on the banks of Periyar River near Kalady.

topPlaces.name: Koovappady
topPlaces.description: Koovappady is a village in Vallom, Perumbavoor ,Ernakulam district in the Indian state of Kerala. Koovappady is around 8 km north of Perumbavoor and is near to the Kodanadu elephant training centre.

topPlaces.name: Kalady
topPlaces.description: Kalady or Kaladi is a town located between Angamaly and Perumbavoor, east of the Periyar River, near Malayattoor in Ernakulam district of Kerala, India, not far from Cochin International Airport. It is notable as the birthplace of 9th century Indian philosopher Adi Shankara.

topPlaces.name: Perumbavoor
topPlaces.description: Perumbavoor ([peɾumbaːʋuːr]) is a major town and municipality in the eastern part of the Kochi metropolitan area in the Indian state of Kerala. As per the 2011 Indian census, Perumbavoor has a population of 28,110 people and is situated on the banks of the Periyar River basin.

topPlaces.name: Vadakkumbhagom
topPlaces.description: Vadakkumbhagom is a village in Ernakulam district in the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Mattoor
topPlaces.description: Mattoor is a small town in the Ernakulam district in the Indian state of Kerala. It is situated 2 km (1.2 mi) north of Kalady on MC Road.

Kalady or Kaladi is a town located between Angamaly and Perumbavoor, east of the Periyar River, near Malayattoor in Ernakulam district of Kerala, India, not far from Cochin International Airport. It is notable as the birthplace of 9th century Indian philosopher Adi Shankara.

Perumbavoor ([peɾumbaːʋuːr]) is a major town and municipality in the eastern part of the Kochi metropolitan area in the Indian state of Kerala. As per the 2011 Indian census, Perumbavoor has a population of 28,110 people and is situated on the banks of the Periyar River basin.
Vadakkumbhagom is a village in Ernakulam district in the Indian state of Kerala.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Chelamattom Shree Krishna Swami Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Chelamattom Shree Krishna Swami Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Chelamattom Shree Krishna Swami Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (6 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (26 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Chelamattom Shree Krishna Swami Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Chelamattom Shree Krishna Swami Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Chelamattom Shree Krishna Swami Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Chelamattom Shree Krishna Swami Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Chelamattom Shree Krishna Swami Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Chelamattom, Cheranalloor East, Thottuva, Koovappady, Kalady.
